theme.name: Prism Executive Aurora Glass
theme.intent: Modern mobile executive workspace with a glassmorphism homepage and a top-mounted scheduler drawer.

typography.heading: Poppins
rules: Headings use tighter tracking for executive density.
Body copy stays high-contrast and calm for long reading sessions.
Labels use uppercase eyebrow styling instead of decorative iconography.

motionRules.drawer: Pointer drag plus snap points at 18%, 24%, 42%, 78%

viRules: No emoji in primary UI chrome or status communication.
Blue is reserved for forward action, violet for AI context, amber for conflicts, green for completion.
The scheduler keeps urgency, conflict, and completion as separate signals.
Glass surfaces always sit on dark aurora fields to preserve contrast.
